name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, empty media folders, and orphaned subtitles. Repairs broken .strm files. Provides media library statistics with video/audio codec analysis, resolution/container breakdown, health checks (embedded subtitle detection), caching, historical trends, trash/recycle bin with detailed contents UI, multi-instance Arr stack integration (up to 3 Radarr + 3 Sonarr) with connection testing, plugin-specific log viewer with download and filtering, and a multi-language 7-tab dashboard (en, de, fr, es, pt, zh, tr).
overview: Automated cleanup (trickplay, empty folders, subtitles, STRM repair), media statistics with codec/health analysis, trends, trash bin, plugin log viewer, multi-instance Arr integration, and multi-language 7-tab dashboard.

versions.changelog: v1.1.0: Performance optimizations for GrowthTimelineService and BackupService, refactored monolith services, improved cross-platform compatibility, new ARCHITECTURE.md, Trends UI enhancements.

v1.0.9: Removed legacy statistics history (replaced by growth timeline), removed Export/CSV endpoints, new StatisticsCacheService, legacy history file cleanup, growth timeline interpolation & deduplication, reduced backup size limit, 957 tests.
v1.0.8: Project restructure, bug fix for Jellyfin versions below 10.11.8, backup/restore data, enhanced TrendChart, relocated download buttons, responsive Data Tree for touch devices.

v1.0.7: Added i18n support (EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, TR, ZH), scheduled task for cleaning empty media folders, trend chart visualization, configurable intervals, and automatic plugin data directory creation.
Exclude trash folders from media statistics, fix false positives for orphaned TV show metadata directories, fix trash disable dialog in UI.

Multi-instance Arr support (up to 3 Radarr + 3 Sonarr), Arr connection test endpoint, persisted latest scan results (survives restarts), post-cleanup statistics scan, embedded subtitle detection in health checks, video vs music audio codec split, codec file path tracking with clickable drill-down, trash contents detail API, trash folder management UI, trash disable dialog, other file tracking, 6-tab modular dashboard (Overview/Codecs/Health/Trends/Settings/Arr), modular CSS/JS build system, XSS protection, boxset/collection health check skipping, comprehensive README rewrite, 573 tests.

Added STRM file repair task, unified TaskMode system (Activate/DryRun/Deactivate per task), single master HelperCleanupTask replacing separate scheduled tasks, fixed ConfigVersion not preserved on settings save, fixed DI resolution for System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem, updated README, 315 tests.

Fixed plugin logo 404 (logo.png now included as physical file in release ZIP with meta.json imagePath), fixed SanitizeFileName null-char handling, removed duplicate Cleanup Statistics UI section, removed unused GetThumbImage method, 244 tests.

Fixed subtitle false positives (explicit ISO 639 allowlists instead of naive 2-3 letter heuristic), moved SubtitleFlags/KnownLanguageCodes to MediaExtensions, ArrIntegrationService now uses IHttpClientFactory, CleanupTrackingService thread-safety with lock, specific exception handling, removed _ = ex anti-pattern, 244 tests.
Fixed config page not loading (script/style tags moved inside page div), plugin now visible in Jellyfin sidebar menu with EnableInMainMenu, updated test count to 212.

Initial release with trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, orphaned subtitle cleaner, media statistics dashboard, audio codec analysis, export (JSON/CSV), historical trends, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr), multi-language dashboard (en/de/fr/es/pt/zh/tr), library whitelist/blacklist, and 196 tests.
